introSection: Objectif Mars is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Futuroscope in Chasseneuil-du-Poitou, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. The ride is themed around a mission to Mars, containing both indoor and outdoor sections, as well as a vertical drop track, similar to Thirteen at Alton Towers. It opened on 13 June 2020.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In April 2023, two people were injured in a fire that broke out in a lithium battery on one of the trains. The ride reopened in July 2023 albeit without the spinning function. The spinning feature was resumed in February 2025.

fullText:
Objectif Mars is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Futuroscope in Chasseneuil-du-Poitou, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. The ride is themed around a mission to Mars, containing both indoor and outdoor sections, as well as a vertical drop track, similar to Thirteen at Alton Towers. It opened on 13 June 2020.

In April 2023, two people were injured in a fire that broke out in a lithium battery on one of the trains. The ride reopened in July 2023 albeit without the spinning function. The spinning feature was resumed in February 2025.
